# New Epics to Implement

## E2E Test Failures

There are 5 E2E tests that are failing when I run `pnpm e2e:dms-material:chromium` there are 6 E2E tests that are failing when I run `pnpm e2e:dms-material:firefox`.

It may be that these tests are pass when run individually. That does not change the fact that they are failing when run together. If they are passing when run individually, then that indicates there is something wrong with how the tests are setup and/or how other tests, or these tests, are cleaning up after themselves. If they are not passing when run individually, then that indicates there is something wrong with the functionality that these tests are testing.
